RootScanR Package Report, by pkgnet

Source: vignettes/pkgnetreport.Rmd
pkgnetreport.Rmd

This report on RootScanR is generated by pkgnet, an R package for analyzing other R packages through the lens of networks.

Function Network

This section analyzes the dependency relationships between functions within RootScanR.

Visualization

Nodes are functions. Edges point in the direction of dependence.

Table

Dependency Network

This section analyzes the recursive package dependencies of RootScanR.

In the plot below, you’ll see the following colors:

  • orange: RootScanR
  • gray: R packages available in every R session by default
  • green: third-party R packages

Visualization

Nodes are packages. Edges point in the direction of dependence.

Table

This report built with pkgnet v0.6.0.
